We're Hiring

Join Our Growing Team

We are looking for passionate individuals who want to make a difference in India's business ecosystem

Why Anirah Advisory

Why Join Our Team

We believe in building a workplace where talent thrives, ideas flourish, and every team member can make a real impact.

Growth Opportunities

Rapid career growth with clear pathways. We promote from within and invest in your professional development.

Work-Life Balance

Flexible work hours, remote options, and a supportive culture that respects your personal time and well-being.

Learning & Development

Regular training sessions, industry certifications, mentorship programs, and access to online learning platforms.

Competitive Compensation

Above-market salaries, performance bonuses, health insurance, and comprehensive benefits package.

Open Positions

Current Openings

Find a role that matches your skills and passion. We're growing fast and always looking for talented people.

Business Development Manager

Ahmedabad3-6 yearsFull Time
Apply Now

Drive business growth through client acquisition, relationship management, and strategic partnerships. Strong communication and negotiation skills required.

SalesBusiness DevelopmentClient Relations

Data Analyst

Ahmedabad2+ yearsFull Time
Apply Now

Analyze business data, generate insights, and create reports to support decision-making. Proficiency in Excel, SQL, and data visualization tools required.

Data AnalysisExcelSQLVisualization

Sales Representative

Ahmedabad0.5-1 yearsFull Time
Apply Now

Drive sales through outbound calling, lead generation, and client meetings. Freshers with strong communication skills are welcome.

SalesCommunicationLead Generation

Financial Analyst

Ahmedabad2-4 yearsFull Time
Apply Now

Prepare financial models, business valuations, and investment analysis reports. CFA/CA background preferred.

Financial ModelingValuationExcel

Website Sales Executive

Remote1-3 yearsFull Time
Apply Now

Sell website development services to businesses. Understanding of digital products and strong presentation skills required.

Digital SalesPresentationWordPress
Benefits

Perks & Benefits

Health Insurance
Performance Bonus

Professional Development

Application Process

How to Apply

1

Apply

Send your resume to careers@anirahadvisory.in with the job title in the subject line.

2

Screening

Our HR team reviews your application and schedules a preliminary call.

3

Interview

Attend technical and cultural fit interviews with the team lead and founders.

4

Offer

Receive your offer letter and join the Anirah Advisory family!

Email

careers@anirahadvisory.in

Locations

Ahmedabad (HQ) & Chennai (Branch)

Quick Process

1-2 week turnaround time

Ready to Make a Difference?

Join Anirah Advisory and help thousands of Indian businesses start, grow, and succeed. Send us your resume today.

Send Your Resume+91 99980 06734
